notices.title: System Reference Document 5.2.1 attribution
notices.text:
# Attribution

This profile adapts action names and bounded rules concepts from the
**System Reference Document 5.2.1** by Wizards of the Coast LLC, licensed under **Creative Commons
Attribution 4.0 International (CC BY 4.0)**.

Source: https://www.dndbeyond.com/srd

License text: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode

The action registry, compatibility mappings, resolver classifications,
collectible-item roles, equipment slots, and CosyWorld deltas are modified
material authored for CosyWorld. The complete source attribution is preserved
by the independently versioned `cosyworld.rules-srd-5.2.1` reference pack.

notices.title: System Reference Document 5.1 attribution
notices.text:
# SRD 5.1 attribution

This work includes material taken from the System Reference Document 5.1
(“SRD 5.1”) by Wizards of the Coast LLC and available at
https://dnd.wizards.com/resources/systems-reference-document. The SRD 5.1 is
licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License
available at https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/legalcode.

Conversion of the source document to the JSON reference files used by the
importer was performed by the team at Tabyltop (https://www.tabyltop.com).
